# Test Automation Summary — Story 1.4 (Fail-closed `party_id` claim resolution)

**Workflow:** `bmad-qa-generate-e2e-tests` · **Date:** 2026-06-10 · **Generated by:** Administrator (QA automation)
**Framework (detected, reused):** xUnit v3 + Shouldly + bUnit (Blazor) — the project's house style. NSubstitute available, not needed here.
**Story status going in:** `review` — feature implemented; this run hardens automated coverage and auto-applies discovered gaps.

> **No API tests:** the Parties UI host is a BFF with **no public API / controllers** (project-context boundary rule). The
> "E2E" surface for this Blazor Server host is **bUnit component/routing + DI-composition** tests — the same posture stories
> 1.2/1.3 used. All tests below are in that idiom.

## Baseline

- Before: **60 tests, 60 pass, 0 skipped** (`Hexalith.Parties.UI.Tests`).
- After: **69 tests, 69 pass, 0 skipped** — **+9 tests**, build clean (0 warnings under solution-wide `TreatWarningsAsErrors`), build-gate green.

## Discovered gaps → applied (auto)

| # | Gap (AC) | Test added | File |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **AC1 integration** — transformation→resolver composition (effective scope `{tenant, party_id}` from a raw token) was only proven per-component, never end-to-end | `NormalizedTenantFromTransformation_IsCapturedIntoBoundScope` | `PartyIdClaimResolverTests.cs` |
| 2 | **AC4 lifetime** — nothing pinned the **Scoped** registration; `ValidateScopes` can't catch a Singleton here (no captured scoped deps), so a Singleton regression would pass silently | `AddPartiesUiClaimsResolution_RegistersResolverAndTransformationAsScoped` | `PartyIdClaimResolverTests.cs` |
| 3 | **Fail-closed null input** — `PartyIdClaimResolver.Resolve(null)` guard untested | `Resolve_NullUser_ThrowsArgumentNullException` | `PartyIdClaimResolverTests.cs` |
| 4 | **Transformation branch: `tenant_id` source** — only `tid` was covered (`tenant_id ?? tid`) | `AbsentTenantClaim_DerivesNormalizedClaimFromTenantId` | `PartiesClaimsTransformationTests.cs` |
| 5 | **Transformation branch: space-delimited `tenants`** — only the JSON-array path was covered | `AbsentTenantClaim_DerivesNormalizedClaimsFromSpaceDelimitedTenants` | `PartiesClaimsTransformationTests.cs` |
| 6 | **Transformation branch: multi-value JSON array** — single-element test never proved the per-item loop | `AbsentTenantClaim_DerivesNormalizedClaimsFromMultiValueTenantsJsonArray` | `PartiesClaimsTransformationTests.cs` |
| 7 | **Fail-closed null input** — `PartiesClaimsTransformation.TransformAsync(null)` guard untested | `NullPrincipal_ThrowsArgumentNullException` | `PartiesClaimsTransformationTests.cs` |
| 8 | **AC2 render** — only the `[Authorize]` attribute was reflected; nothing proved the `NoPartyBinding` page renders a single focusable `<h1>` (the `FocusOnNavigate` target) | `NoPartyBinding_LeadsWithASingleFocusableHeading` | `NoPartyBindingPageTests.cs` *(new)* |
| 9 | **AC2 non-data screen** — nothing proved the page renders only static onboarding copy (no data controls) | `NoPartyBinding_RendersStaticReassuringOnboardingCopy_NotADataScreen` | `NoPartyBindingPageTests.cs` *(new)* |

## Generated / modified tests

### E2E (bUnit component) tests
- [x] `tests/Hexalith.Parties.UI.Tests/NoPartyBindingPageTests.cs` *(new)* — renders the fail-closed page; asserts a single focusable `<h1>`, reassuring onboarding copy, and **no** data controls (`input`/`button`). Uses semantic locators (`Find("h1")`, `FindAll(...)`).

### Component-resolution / DI-composition tests
- [x] `tests/Hexalith.Parties.UI.Tests/PartyIdClaimResolverTests.cs` *(extended +3)* — transform→resolve integration (AC1), Scoped-lifetime pin (AC4/ADR-030), null fail-closed guard.
- [x] `tests/Hexalith.Parties.UI.Tests/PartiesClaimsTransformationTests.cs` *(extended +4)* — `tenant_id` / space-delimited / multi-value-JSON normalization branches, null fail-closed guard.

### Already present (verified green, untouched)
- `NoPartyBindingRoutingTests.cs` — AC1/AC2/AC3 routing (present→`/me`, absent→`/no-party-binding` `ShouldNotEndWith("/me")`, ambiguous→fail-closed).
- `RoleLandingRedirectTests.cs` — role landing incl. bound-Consumer `/me`.
- `PartiesUiAreaAuthorizationTests.cs` — `NoPartyBinding` pinned to the Consumer policy.

## Coverage

- **Acceptance criteria:** AC1 ✅ (now incl. transform→resolve composition) · AC2 ✅ (routing + page render) · AC3 ✅ (ambiguous fail-closed) · AC4 ✅ (now incl. Scoped-lifetime pin) · AC5 ✅ (bUnit present/absent + DI present/absent/empty/multiple).
- **`PartyIdClaimResolver`:** present / absent / empty / whitespace / multiple / no-tenant / null — fully covered.
- **`PartiesClaimsTransformation` branches:** short-circuit · `tid` · `tenant_id` · `tenants` JSON (single + multi) · `tenants` space-delimited · no-source · idempotent · null — fully covered.
- **`NoPartyBinding` page:** route + policy (reflection) and rendered output (bUnit) — covered.

## How to run

```bash
dotnet build tests/Hexalith.Parties.UI.Tests -c Release -m:1
tests/Hexalith.Parties.UI.Tests/bin/Release/net10.0/Hexalith.Parties.UI.Tests
```
> Do **not** use `dotnet test --filter` (xUnit v3 MTP returns "Zero tests ran"); run the test EXE directly, `-class`/`-method` to filter.

## Checklist validation (`checklist.md`)

- [x] API tests generated — N/A (BFF, no public API) · [x] E2E tests generated (bUnit) · [x] standard framework APIs · [x] happy path · [x] 1–2 critical error cases
- [x] All tests pass (69/69) · [x] semantic/accessible locators · [x] clear descriptions · [x] no hardcoded waits (`WaitForAssertion`, no `Thread.Sleep`) · [x] independent (each builds its own provider/`BunitContext`)
- [x] Summary created · [x] saved to `tests/Hexalith.Parties.UI.Tests/` · [x] coverage metrics included

## Notes / next steps (not auto-applied — needs a CI decision)

- ⚠️ **`Hexalith.Parties.UI.Tests` is not wired into `scripts/test.ps1 -Lane unit` nor the CI shards** — it runs **only** under the `.slnx`-wide `all`/`coverage` lanes. These 69 tests (and the 1.2/1.3 UI tests) therefore don't run in the per-shard CI `test` job. Recommend adding the project to `$unitProjects` in `scripts/test.ps1` (and the CI shard list) so UI regressions gate PRs. Left for the user — it changes CI behavior for all UI-host stories, not just 1.4.
- Live (non-test) Consumer→`/me` flow still depends on the `party_id` claim being issued — that mechanism is **AR-Gap-Binding (Stories 4.1/4.2)**. The bUnit/DI tests remain the binding proof until then (as the story notes).
